---
title: "homework-03-script"
author: "Claire Timm"
date: "2026-03-01"
format: html
editor: visual
message: false # use this to make sure messages don't show up
  warning: false # use this to make sure warnings don't show up
---

# Set up 

```{r}
#| label: packages and data

#read in packages here
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)

#read in data here
salinity <- read_csv("data/salinity-pickleweed.csv")
```
